MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF DAVID DOW, WISECRACKER L.L.C. MOTION TO ADMIT CLIFFORD L. BEEM OF CLIFFORD BEEM & ASSOCIATES, P.C. TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE. Appearances: Norman L. Chong, of Tarkington, O'Neill, Barrack & Chong (415) 345-0715, appearing for Plaintiffs and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
